• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps and real-time networking.
  • Features include vehicle upgrades, resource management, building mechanics, and a shop system for trading and upgrades.
  • Supports both desktop and mobile controls with customizable key bindings and a full settings panel.
  • Implements cloud save functionality and admin tools for server management.
    const TILE_PROPS = {
  [TILE_TYPES.COAL]: { name: "Coal", color: '#2c3e50', hardness: 2, value: 10, tier: 0, trashExclude: true },
  [TILE_TYPES.IRON]: { name: "Iron", color: '#95a5a6', hardness: 2, value: 50, tier: 1, trashExclude: true },
  [TILE_TYPES.GOLD]: { name: "Gold", color: '#f1c40f', hardness: 1, value: 150, tier: 2, trashExclude: true }
};

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game featuring procedurally generated maps, real-time networking, and extensive customization options. Players can mine resources, upgrade their vehicles, trade in shops, and build structures while managing fuel and health. The game supports both desktop and mobile controls with cloud save functionality and admin tools for server management.
